[@microsoft/fast-element](../fast-element/index.html) &gt; [FASTElementConstructor](../fast-element.fastelementconstructor/index.html) &gt; [styleNonce](../fast-element.fastelementconstructor.stylenonce/index.html)

## FASTElementConstructor.styleNonce property

The nonce to apply to style elements created when styles are applied with a style element based strategy. An alias of [ElementStyles.styleNonce](../fast-element.elementstyles.stylenonce/)<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
styleNonce: string | null;
```
